name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BakeryMutex ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES turn, state

(* State values *)
Idle == 0
Trying == 1
Critical == 2

(* Helper to get the set of processes *)
ProcSet == 1..N

(* Initial state: all processes idle, no turn assigned *)
Init == /\ turn = [i \in ProcSet |-> 0]
        /\ state = [i \in ProcSet |-> Idle]

(* Helper to find the process with the smallest non-zero ticket *)
MinTicket ==
  LET nonZeroTickets == {i \in ProcSet : turn[i] # 0}
  IN IF nonZeroTickets = {} THEN 0

          \A j \in nonZeroTickets : turn[m] <= turn[j]

(* Transition relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in ProcSet :
    \/ (* Process i attempts to enter critical section *)
       (state[i] = Idle /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Trying] /\ UNCHANGED turn)
    \/ (* Process i takes the next ticket *)
       (state[i] = Trying /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle] /\
        turn' = [turn EXCEPT ![i] = MAX({turn[j] : j \in ProcSet}) + 1])
    \/ (* Process i enters critical section if it has the smallest ticket *)
       (state[i] = Idle /\ turn[i] # 0 /\ MinTicket = i /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Critical] /\ UNCHANGED turn)
    \/ (* Process i exits critical section *)
       (state[i] = Critical /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = Idle] /\ turn' = [turn EXCEPT ![i] = 0])

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, state>>

(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical section *)
TypeOK == \A i, j \in ProcSet : (state[i] = Critical /\ state[j] = Critical) => i = j

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N
VARIABLES decision, phase, state


(* Participants are numbered 1..N *)
Participants == 1..N

(* State of each participant: "INIT", "YES", or "NO" *)
StateValues == {"INIT", "YES", "NO"}

(* Decision values *)
DecisionValues == {"NONE", "COMMIT", "ABORT"}

(* Phase values *)
PhaseValues == {"PREPARE", "VOTE", "DECIDE", "END"}

(* Initial state: all participants are in "INIT" state, phase is "PREPARE", decision is "NONE" *)
Init == /\ state \in [Participants -> StateValues]
        /\ phase \in PhaseValues
        /\ decision \in DecisionValues
        /\ \A p \in Participants: state[p] = "INIT"
        /\ phase = "PREPARE"
        /\ decision = "NONE"

(* Transition when the coordinator sends a "PREPARE" message to all participants *)
Prepare ==
  /\ phase = "PREPARE"
  /\ phase' = "VOTE"

(* Transition when all participants vote "YES" *)
VoteYes ==
  /\ phase = "VOTE"
  /\ \A p \in Participants: state[p] = "YES"
  /\ phase' = "DECIDE"
  /\ decision' = "COMMIT"

(* Transition when at least one participant votes "NO" *)
VoteNo ==
  /\ phase = "VOTE"
  /\ \E p \in Participants: state[p] = "NO"
  /\ phase' = "DECIDE"
  /\ decision' = "ABORT"

(* Transition when the coordinator sends a "COMMIT" message to all participants *)
Commit ==
  /\ phase = "DECIDE"
  /\ decision = "COMMIT"
  /\ phase' = "END"

(* Transition when the coordinator sends an "ABORT" message to all participants *)
Abort ==
  /\ phase = "DECIDE"
  /\ decision = "ABORT"
  /\ phase' = "END"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \/ Prepare
  \/ VoteYes
  \/ VoteNo
  \/ Commit
  \/ Abort

(* The specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, phase, decision>>

(* Safety property: the decision is either "COMMIT" or "ABORT" *)
Safety == (decision = "COMMIT" \/ decision = "ABORT")

(* Liveness property: the protocol eventually terminates *)
Termination == <> (phase = "END")

(* Invariant: the state of each participant is either "INIT", "YES", or "NO" *)
TypeOK == \A p \in Participants: state[p] \in StateValues

THEOREM Spec => []Safety
THEOREM Spec => []Termination

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

(* Define the set of philosophers and forks *)
Philosophers == 1..N
Forks == 1..N

(* Helper to get the left and right fork for a philosopher *)
LeftFork(i) == i
RightFork(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES state, forks

(* State can be "thinking", "hungry", or "eating" for each philosopher *)
State == {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state: all philosophers are thinking and all forks are free *)
Init == /\ state \in [Philosophers -> State]
        /\ forks = [f \in Forks |-> TRUE]

(* Predicate: philosopher i can start eating (both forks free) *)
CanEat(i) == forks[LeftFork(i)] /\ forks[RightFork(i)]

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "hungry"
  /\ CanEat(i)
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = FALSE, ![RightFork(i)] = FALSE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and stops eating *)
PutForks(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "eating"
  /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LeftFork(i)] = TRUE, ![RightFork(i)] = TRUE]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry (ready to eat) *)
BecomeHungry(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "thinking"
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
  /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher can transition *)
Next ==
  \E i \in Philosophers :
    TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i) \/ BecomeHungry(i)

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, forks>>

(* Invariant: no two adjacent philosophers are eating simultaneously *)
NoAdjacentEating ==
  \A i \in Philosophers :
    ~(state[i] = "eating" /\ state[IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1] = "eating")

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Proc
ASSUME N \in Nat
ASSUME Proc = 1..N

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]

maxNum == MAXIMUM(VALUES(num))

nextNum(p) == IF maxNum = 0 THEN 1 ELSE maxNum + 1

Next ==
  \E p \in Proc :
    \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
    \/ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![p] = FALSE]
    \/ flag[p] /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![p] = nextNum(p)]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the buffer.
   head points to the next element to consume,
   tail points to the next free slot for production,
   size is the current number of elements. *)

Init == 
    /\ q = << >>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: add an element x to the queue if not full *)
Produce(x) == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, x)
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: remove an element from the queue if not empty *)
Consume == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED <<q, tail>>

Next == Produce(1) \/ Consume

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N \* number of servers, NULL
ASSUME N \in 1..5

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* State space *)
States == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state: all servers are followers with term 0 and no votes *)
Init == /\ currentTerm = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

(* Helper: majority threshold *)
Majority == (N \div 2) + 1

(* Transition: server becomes candidate *)
BecomeCandidate(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Follower"
  /\ currentTerm' = [currentTerm EXCEPT ![i] = @ + 1]
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* Helper: vote granted if term matches *)
GrantVote(i, j) ==
  /\ currentTerm[j] = currentTerm[i]
  /\ votedFor[j] = NULL
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![j] = i]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, state>>

(* Helper: check if candidate has majority *)
HasMajority(i) ==
  LET votes == {j \in 1..N : votedFor[j] = i}
  IN Cardinality(votes) >= Majority

(* Transition: candidate becomes leader if majority *)
BecomeLeader(i) ==
  /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
  /\ HasMajority(i)
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<currentTerm, votedFor>>

(* General next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    \E action \in {BecomeCandidate, GrantVote, BecomeLeader} :
      action(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

(* readers: set of reader IDs currently reading
   writer_active: 0 if no writer, 1 if a writer is active *)

Init == /\ readers = {}
        /\ writer_active = 0

(* Reader i starts reading if no writer is active *)
ReadStart(i) == 
  /\ i \in 1..N
  /\ writer_active = 0
  /\ readers' = readers \cup {i}
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Reader i stops reading *)
ReadEnd(i) ==
  /\ i \in readers
  /\ readers' = readers \ {i}
  /\ UNCHANGED writer_active

(* Writer starts writing if no readers or writer *)
WriteStart == 
  /\ writer_active = 0
  /\ readers = {}
  /\ writer_active' = 1
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

(* Writer stops writing *)
WriteEnd ==
  /\ writer_active = 1
  /\ writer_active' = 0
  /\ UNCHANGED readers

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (ReadStart(i) \/ ReadEnd(i))
        \/ WriteStart
        \/ WriteEnd

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS N, Proc, Chan
(* Proc is the set of processes, Chan is the set of directed channels (p,q) *)

VARIABLES state, channel, recvd, snapshot, finished

(* state[p] is the local state of process p
   channel[(p,q)] is the sequence of messages in transit on channel p->q
   recvd[p] is the set of markers received by p
   snapshot[p] is TRUE iff p has recorded its state
   finished is the set of processes that have finished recording *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ recvd = [p \in Proc |-> {}]
        /\ snapshot = [p \in Proc |-> FALSE]
        /\ finished = {}

SendMsg(p, q, m) == 
  channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], m)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, snapshot, finished>>

RecvMsg(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])]
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = state[p] + 1]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<recvd, snapshot, finished>>

SendMarker(p, q) ==
  channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(p, q)] = Append(channel[(p, q)], "marker")]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, recvd, snapshot, finished>>

RecvMarker(p, q) ==
  LET msg == Head(channel[(q, p)]) IN
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT ![(q, p)] = Tail(channel[(q, p)])]
  /\ recvd' = [recvd EXCEPT ![p] = recvd[p] \cup {q}]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, snapshot, finished>>

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![p] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, recvd, finished>>

Finish(p) ==
  /\ finished' = finished \cup {p}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, channel, recvd, snapshot>>

Next ==
  \E p, q \in Proc :
    \/ SendMsg(p, q, 1)
    \/ RecvMsg(p, q)
    \/ SendMarker(p, q)
    \/ RecvMarker(p, q)
    \/ RecordState(p)
    \/ Finish(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, recvd, snapshot, finished>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ state \in [Proc -> Nat]
  /\ channel \in [Chan -> Seq(Nat)]
  /\ recvd \in [Proc -> SUBSET Proc]
  /\ snapshot \in [Proc -> BOOLEAN]
  /\ finished \in SUBSET Proc

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token, sent

(* Token is the index of the node that currently holds the token.
   sent is a set of messages that have been sent. *)

Init == /\ token \in 1..N
        /\ sent = {}

Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N :
        /\ token' = IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {i}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token, sent>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

(* State variables *)
VARIABLES store

(* Helper to check that store is a function from Keys to Values *)
StoreOK == \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

(* Initial state: all keys map to some initial value (e.g., 0) *)
Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]

(* Next-state relation: a client can perform Put or Get *)
Next ==
  \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v] \* Put operation
    \/ TRUE \* Get operation does not change state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

(* Invariant: store always remains a valid mapping *)
TypeOK == StoreOK

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V, VALUES

(* Ballot numbers are natural numbers *)
Ballot == Nat

(* State of each acceptor: [promised: Ballot, accepted: [value -> V, ballot -> Ballot] \cup {nil}] *)
AcceptorState == [promised: Ballot, accepted: [value -> V, ballot -> Ballot] \cup {nil}]

(* Global state *)
VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, chosen, i, j

(* Initial state: no promises, no accepts, nothing chosen *)
Init ==
    /\ acceptors \in [i \in 1..N |-> [promised |-> 0, accepted |-> nil]]
    /\ proposers \in [j \in 1..M |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> CHOOSE(V)]]
    /\ chosen = {}

(* Helper: proposer j's current ballot and value *)
Proposer(j) == proposers[j]

(* Helper: acceptor i's state *)
Acceptor(i) == acceptors[i]

(* Phase 1: Prepare/Promise *)
Prepare(j, b) ==
    /\ Proposer(j).ballot = b
    /\ \A i \in 1..N :
        /\ Acceptor(i).promised <= b
        /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].promised = b]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

(* Helper: collect promises *)
CollectPromises(j, b, promises) ==
    /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> Acceptor(i).accepted]
    /\ \A i \in 1..N : Acceptor(i).promised = b

(* Helper: choose highest accepted value among promises *)
ChooseValue(promises) ==
    CHOOSE v \in {p.value : p \in VALUES(promises) /\ p # nil}

(* Phase 2: Accept/Accepted *)
Accept(j, b, v) ==
    /\ Proposer(j).ballot = b
    /\ \A i \in 1..N :
        /\ Acceptor(i).promised = b
        /\ acceptors' = [acceptors EXCEPT ![i].accepted = [value |-> v, ballot |-> b]]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<proposers, chosen>>

(* Once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)
Chosen(v) ==
    /\ v \in V
    /\ chosen' = chosen \cup {v}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<acceptors, proposers>>

(* One step of the protocol *)
Step ==
    \E j \in 1..M :
        \E b \in 1..1000 :
            \E v \in V :
                /\ Prepare(j, b)
                /\ LET promises == [i \in 1..N |-> Acceptor(i).accepted] IN
                   /\ CollectPromises(j, b, promises)
                   /\ Accept(j, b, ChooseValue(promises))
                /\ Chosen(ChooseValue(promises))

Next == Step

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, chosen>>

(* Invariants *)
TypeOK ==
    /\ acceptors \in [1..N -> AcceptorState]
    /\ proposers \in [1..M -> [ballot -> Ballot, value -> V]]
    /\ chosen \subseteq V

NoDuplicateChoice ==
    \A v1, v2 \in chosen : v1 = v2

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT n
CONSTANT MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES sent, acked, current, retries

AllSent == sent = 1..n
ValidChunk == 1 <= current /\ current <= n

Init ==
    /\ sent = {}
    /\ current = 1
    /\ retries = 0
    /\ acked = {}

Channel ==
    CHOOSE lost \in BOOLEAN :
        /\ sent' = sent \cup {current}
        /\ current' = current
        /\ retries' = retries
        /\ acked' = acked

Receiver ==
    CHOOSE ack \in BOOLEAN :
        /\ acked' = acked \cup {current}
        /\ sent' = sent
        /\ current' = current
        /\ retries' = retries

Sender ==

        /\ current' = current + 1
        /\ retries' = 0
        /\ sent' = sent
        /\ acked' = acked

        /\ current' = current + 1
        /\ retries' = 0
        /\ sent' = sent
        /\ acked' = acked

Next ==
    /\ ValidChunk
    /\ Channel
    /\ Receiver
    /\ Sender

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, current, retries, acked>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ sent \subseteq 1..n
    /\ acked \subseteq 1..n

SpecLiveness == <> AllSent
====
